scripts.dev: docker-compose -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml up -d && npm run dev --workspaces --if-present
scripts.verify:strict: npm run test && npm run e2e && npm run build
scripts.dev:backend:strict: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:ENFORCE_RBAC='true'; $env:OTEL_ENABLED='true'; $env:OTEL_SERVICE_NAME='siag-backend'; $env:OTEL_SERVICE_VERSION='1.0.0'; $env:OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT='http://localhost:4318/v1/traces'; npm run dev --workspace backend"
